title: Model Name Hallucination / Future Reference
description: API call targets 'gemini-3.5-flash', which is not a currently available Gemini model. This will cause HTTP 404 or 400 errors in production.

title: Sensitive API Keys in LocalStorage
description: Supabase keys and Gemini API keys are persisted in plain text in LocalStorage. This makes the application vulnerable to credential theft via Cross-Site Scripting (XSS).
suggestion:
### AS-IS
```typescript
const localKey = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEYS.SUPABASE_ANON_KEY);
```
### TO-BE
```typescript
// Avoid persisting sensitive keys in LocalStorage.
```

title: Sequential Network Request Bottleneck
description: Code analysis is performed sequentially within a loop using 'await'.

title: OAuth Scope Too Broad
description: Login scope includes 'cloud-platform' which provides excessive privileges. Violates principle of least privilege.

title: Hardcoded UI Trend Data
description: Dashboard trend chart uses a static array instead of mapping real analysis history.
suggestion:
### AS-IS
```typescript
const chartTrendData = [ { name: '05-24', issues: 5 }, ... ];
```
### TO-BE
```typescript
// Map analysisRuns from Supabase to trend chart data.
```

title: Magic Timeout for Syntax Highlighting
description: setTimeout 50ms used for Prism. Potential race condition.
suggestion:
### AS-IS
```typescript
setTimeout(() => { Prism.highlightAll(); }, 50);
```
### TO-BE
```typescript
useEffect(() => { if(codeRef.current) Prism.highlightElement(codeRef.current); }, [issue]);
```

title: Global State Mutation in Review
description: Mutating global mockComments array instead of using local state or backend updates.
suggestion:
### AS-IS
```typescript
const issueComments = mockComments.filter(...);
```
### TO-BE
```typescript
// Use Supabase to persist comments and local state for UI updates.
```

title: Non-Atomic Database Operations
description: Separate network calls for project/run/issue insertion.
suggestion:
### AS-IS
```typescript
await supabase.from('projects').insert(...);
```
### TO-BE
```typescript
// Use Supabase RPC transaction.
```

title: Inaccurate Priority Score Formula
suggestion:
### AS-IS
```typescript
const offset = Math.floor(Math.random() * 10);
```
### TO-BE
```typescript
const score = ((severity * 0.6) + (impact * 0.3) + (likelihood * 0.1)) * 10;
```

title: Credentials in Settings localStorage
description: Settings component persists anon key in plain text.
suggestion:
### AS-IS
```typescript
localStorage.setItem('code_eye_supabase_anon_key', key);
```
### TO-BE
```typescript
// Use secure environment variable injection or encrypted storage.
```
